description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features an open, utilitarian frame with a flat cargo bed and minimal bodywork, painted in a military green color. The vehicle is equipped with four large, rugged wheels suitable for off-road conditions, and a round steering wheel mounted on a simple column. The seating consists of two basic, angular seats with no visible seatbelts or enclosure, emphasizing its stripped-down, functional design. A prominent cylindrical object resembling a large tube or cannon is mounted along one side of the vehicle, accompanied by several cylindrical items that appear to be shells or equipment. The vehicle's bed also contains a box and other gear, suggesting it is designed for utility or specialized tasks. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with exposed framework and utilitarian details.
description: A rugged, open-frame all-terrain vehicle with four large wheels, a round steering wheel, and a prominent cylindrical mount along one side, painted in military green.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open frame, two seats, round steering wheel, and the large cylindrical mount with additional gear on the cargo bed.
description_view_1: Front-angled view highlighting the cylindrical mount running the length of the vehicle, the steering wheel, and the arrangement of gear in the bed.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the open seating, steering column, and the cylindrical mount with gear, emphasizing the vehicle's flat cargo area.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the cargo bed, gear arrangement, and the cylindrical mount extending forward, with the steering wheel and seats visible at the front.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a blocky, all-terrain tread pattern designed for traction on rough and uneven surfaces, suitable for off-road use.
